creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 190811
net-mgmt/prometheus1: Move rcscript

This is a more concise diff which properly notes the move of `files/prometheus.in -> files/prometheus1.in` instead of representing it as a delete/create.

It also contains some Makefile fixes taken from the net-mgmt/prometheus2 port and adds a pkg-message notifying people that they should see the net-mgmt/prometheus2 pkg-message if they're performing a migration.
